zh.Durrës, Durrës, Albania: 阿爾巴尼亞度艾斯度艾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Troian of Bulgaria於0990年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Tsar Ivan Vladislav24歲，母親Marija Princess of Bulgaria18歲。他和Kontostephane Aballantia至少有1個女兒。他在保加利亞被列為czar of bulgaria。他去世於1048年享年58歲。

zh-hans.Durrës, Durrës, Albania: 阿尔巴尼亚度艾斯度艾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Troian of Bulgaria于0990年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Tsar Ivan Vladislav24岁，母亲Marija Princess of Bulgaria18岁。他和Kontostephane Aballantia至少有1个女儿。他在保加利亚被列为czar of bulgaria。他去世于1048年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Troian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (from Belarus): habitational name from Troya in Belarus, or from a place called Trojany, of which there are several examples in Poland.
Americanized form of Polish, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and German   Trojan  .

variants.name: Trojan
meanings: Polish, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and German (of Slavic origin): from the Old Slavic personal name Trojan, borne by a mythical creature from the early Slavic records. It may be a derivative of Latin Traianus, the name of a Roman emperor (53–117), who extended the Roman Empire east into Dacia (modern Romania), or a name of Old Slavic origin, derived from the adjective trojь ‘triple, treble’; this personal name was used among Czechs as a name bestowed on children born on the Feast of the Holy Trinity, and among Croats as an omen or well-wishing name. Compare Troyan .
Czech: topographic or habitational name referring to a house named U trojky zlaté, distinguished by the sign of a Golden Three.
Possibly also French: from the Latin personal name Troianus ‘Trojan’. This gained currency as having been the name of a 6th-century Christian saint, bishop of Saintes. Compare Italian Troiano .

en.lifeSummary: When Troian of Bulgaria was born in 0990, in İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Tsar Ivan Vladislav, was 24 and his mother, Marija Princess of Bulgaria, was 18. He had at least 1 daughter with Kontostephane Aballantia. His occupation is listed as czar of bulgaria in Bulgaria. He died in 1048, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Troian of Bulgaria est né en 0990, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Tsar Ivan Vladislav, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Marija Princess of Bulgaria, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Kontostephane Aballantia. Sa profession de son indiquée est czar of bulgaria à Bulgarie. Il est décédé en 1048, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Troian of Bulgaria 0990 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tsar Ivan Vladislav 24 und seine Mutter Marija Princess of Bulgaria 18. Er hatte mit Kontostephane Aballantia mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als czar of bulgaria in Bulgarien aufgeführt. Er starb 1048 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Troian of Bulgaria è nato il nel 0990 nel İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Tsar Ivan Vladislav, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Marija Princess of Bulgaria, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Kontostephane Aballantia. La sua occupazione è indicata come czar of bulgaria nel Bulgaria. Morì nel 1048, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.Durrës, Durrës, Albania: アルバニアダルeスダルeス
ja.lifeSummary: Troian of Bulgariaが0990年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Tsar Ivan Vladislavは24歳，母Marija Princess of Bulgariaは18歳であった。彼はKontostephane Aballantiaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。ブルガリアでの職業はczar of bulgariaと記録されている。彼は1048年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Troian of Bulgaria(이)가 0990년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tsar Ivan Vladislav(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Marija Princess of Bulgaria(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Kontostephane Aballantia(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 불가리아에서 czar of bulgaria이었다. 그는 1048년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Troian of Bulgaria nasceu em 0990, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Tsar Ivan Vladislav, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Marija Princess of Bulgaria, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Kontostephane Aballantia. Sua profissão aparece como czar of bulgaria em Bulgária. Ele faleceu em 1048, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Troian of Bulgaria родился в 0990 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Tsar Ivan Vladislav было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Marija Princess of Bulgaria, 18. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Kontostephane Aballantia.  Он работал по профессии czar of bulgaria в местности Болгария. Он умер в 1048 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.from 1029 to 1031: mai le 1029 e o'o I le 1031

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Troian of Bulgaria nació en 0990, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Tsar Ivan Vladislav, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Marija Princess of Bulgaria, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Kontostephane Aballantia. Su ocupación registrada era czar of bulgaria en Bulgaria. Murió en 1048, a la edad de 58 años.
